title: Visible Entries ( Entries)
text: Visible Entries ( Entries) This property specifies the number of items that are displayed when the ComboBox or DropDown List is displayed. By default, 6 items are displayed. A scrollbar is displayed if the list is longer than the visible entries. Entries = Number Example: Setting in ProcScript $properties(LIST) = "entries=10" Copy Applies To ucombobox (Combo Box) udropdownlist (DropDownList) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
